summary: Iteration 64: Backend route refactoring validation. Tested all 19 specified endpoints across 20 modular route files (users.py, students.py, team.py, educators.py, support.py, schools.py, orders.py, misc.py, reports.py, summer_camp.py). Found and fixed 1 critical bug: GET /api/schools/inquiries returning 500 due to missing imports in routes/schools.py. Final result: 34 passed, 2 expected failures (known missing endpoints), 0 real failures.

critical.issue: Returned 500 NameError: 'transform_tracking_url' is not defined. Root cause: routes/schools.py uses transform_tracking_url, fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, and VENDOR_PUBLIC_API from routes/expenses.py but they were NOT imported during refactoring. FIXED: Added 'from .expenses import transform_tracking_url, fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, VENDOR_PUBLIC_API' to schools.py imports.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist. Only /admin/reports/* endpoints exist in routes/reports.py. The test requirement 'GET /api/reports/income-expense' may be incorrect - no such endpoint was ever defined.
Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented. BATCH_DATES constant exists in routes/summer_camp.py but is not exposed via an API route. Carry-over from iteration 63.
routes/misc.py lines 1346 and 1352 both define @router.get('/health') — duplicate route. FastAPI will silently use the first one. Should clean up the duplicate.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/reports/income-expense: XFAIL - endpoint does not exist in codebase

action_items: DONE (fixed): Added missing imports to routes/schools.py — fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, VENDOR_PUBLIC_API from routes/expenses.py
INFO: GET /api/reports/income-expense does not exist — test requirement appears incorrect. Only /admin/reports/* endpoints exist in routes/reports.py. Clarify if this endpoint is needed.
MEDIUM: Add GET /api/summer-camp/batches endpoint exposing BATCH_DATES constant (carry-over from iter 63)
LOW: Remove duplicate @router.get('/health') in routes/misc.py (lines 1346 and 1352 both define same route)
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: routes/schools.py was missing imports for transform_tracking_url, fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, VENDOR_PUBLIC_API from routes/expenses.py. This would cause NameError on any school endpoint that calls PO or tracking URL functions (e.g. GET /api/schools/inquiries, school onboarding with kit delivery). Fixed by adding: from .expenses import transform_tracking_url, fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, VENDOR_PUBLIC_API

Duplicate /health route in routes/misc.py at lines 1346 and 1352 — FastAPI registers both but only uses first. Second should be removed (or one should be registered on app directly without /api prefix for Kubernetes probes).
routes/reports.py has no /reports/income-expense endpoint — only /admin/reports/* routes. If this endpoint is required by the frontend, it needs to be implemented.

success_rate.backend: 100% (34/34 real tests passed; 2 xfailed for known missing endpoints)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64: Route refactoring validated. All 20 modular route files load and serve correctly. Key fix: routes/schools.py was missing expense helper imports causing 500 on school inquiries — now fixed. 2 known missing endpoints: GET /api/reports/income-expense (never existed) and GET /api/summer-camp/batches (404, carry-over from iter 63). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter64_route_refactoring.py covers all refactored modules.

schools_inquiries_500.root_cause: During monolithic server.py refactoring, routes/schools.py was extracted but the imports for helper functions from routes/expenses.py were not carried over. Specifically: transform_tracking_url (used in 10+ places), fetch_po_data (used in 4+ places), fetch_vendor_products (used in 2 places), match_vendor_product (used in 4+ places), VENDOR_PUBLIC_API (used in 1 place) — all defined in routes/expenses.py, all used in routes/schools.py, none imported.
schools_inquiries_500.reproduction: GET /api/schools/inquiries with admin auth → 500 Internal Server Error
schools_inquiries_500.fix: Added to routes/schools.py line 24: from .expenses import transform_tracking_url, fetch_po_data, fetch_vendor_products, match_vendor_product, VENDOR_PUBLIC_API
schools_inquiries_500.affected_endpoints: Any school endpoint that processes PO or tracking data (onboarding kit delivery, school detail pages with PO info, school inquiry listing when POs are present)
